artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis of reflexive G/H semantics refactoring blockers vs current strict semantics blockers. Concludes reflexive refactor has 5+ major blockers with HIGH risk, while current path has 0 practical blockers.

next_steps: No code changes needed. The current irreflexive architecture is sound and complete. The 'blocker' (unprovable axiom) is unused.

reflexive_refactor_blockers: R1: Density axiom trivialization (F(phi) -> F(F(phi)) becomes trivially true)
R2: Seriality axiom redundancy (proof structure changes)
R3: Density frame condition proof architecture collapse
research_findings.effort_estimate_reflexive_refactor: 87-167 hours with HIGH risk of mathematical impossibility
research_findings.historical_evidence: Reflexive semantics tried 2025-12-01 to 2026-03-09 and ABANDONED after 3 months
research_findings.recommendation: DO NOT pursue reflexive refactor. Current irreflexive architecture is sound and complete.
